title: Tachigali urbaniana
taxonomy: Tachigali urbaniana is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to Peru, and its classification is part of the broader family of legumes. The plant's scientific classification is as follows: kingdom - Plantae, clade - Angiosperms, clade - Eudicots, clade - Rosids, order - Fabales, family - Fabaceae, genus - Tachigali, species - T. urbaniana. Within the genus Tachigali, Tachigali urbaniana is one of the many species. Its classification reflects its evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other plants in the Fabaceae family.

intro: Tachigali urbaniana is a species of plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the "Tachigali" or "Sacha Inchi tree." The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its numerous health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to help reduce pain, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system.
